turns.user: tìm cho tôi các người nhện (diễn viên đóng ý )
turns.assistant_text:
Here are some recent articles related to actors who have played Spider-Man:

1. **Tom Holland turns 30! See the 'Spider-Man' star's career and life in photos** - This article from USA Today celebrates Tom Holland's 30th birthday and reflects on his career, including his role as Spider-Man. [Read more here](https://www.usatoday.com/picture-gallery/entertainment/celebrities/2026/06/01/tom-holland-career-life-photos/90312635007/).

2. **Noted New York menace Spider-Man crashes J.K. Simmons’ night at the Mets game** - This piece from the Los Angeles Times discusses J.K. Simmons, who played J. Jonah Jameson in the Spider-Man trilogy, and his recent appearance at a Mets game. [Read more here](https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/movies/story/2026-05-27/spider-man-jk-simmons-j-jonah-jameson-mets-game).

3. **‘Spider-Noir’ Puts Nicolas Cage on a Humphrey Bogart and Marvel Comics Collision Course** - Men's Health explores Nicolas Cage's role in the Spider-Man universe, particularly in the *Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse* film. [Read more here](https://www.menshealth.com/entertainment/a71435338/spider-noir-explained-comics-review-nicolas-cage/).

4. **The Bizarre Legal Reason Spider-Noir Can't Be Called Spider-Man (Or Peter Parker)** - This article from SlashFilm discusses the legal reasons behind the naming of characters in the Spider-Man franchise, focusing on Nicolas Cage's character in *Spider-Noir*. [Read more here](https://www.slashfilm.com/2182557/why-spider-noir-not-called-spider-man-peter-parker-legal-reason/).

5. **Tom Holland Talks MCU Spider-Man Future, Teases 'Setting Up the Next Chapter' for Miles Morales** - IGN India features an interview with Tom Holland discussing his future in the MCU and the potential for new Spider-Man stories. [Read more here](https://in.ign.com/spider-man-brand-new-day/261898/tom-holland-talks-mcu-spider-man-future-teases-setting-up-the-next-chapter-for-miles-morales).

These articles highlight the careers and contributions of various actors associated with the Spider-Man franchise.

items.title: Tom Holland turns 30! See the 'Spider-Man' star's career and life in photos - USA Today
items.summary: # Tom Holland's 30th birthday – 'Spider-Man,' Zendaya, career moments. See the 'Spider-Man' star's career and life in photos. As the "Spider-Man" star enters a new decade, here's a look back at his break-through career, starting here with the June 2023 premiere of Apple TV+'s "The Crowded Room.". Jason Merritt, Getty ImagesImage 3: Holland poses with his Hollywood spotlight Award backstage at the 16th annual Hollywood Film Awards Gala on Oct. 22, 2012, in Beverly Hills, California. Christopher Polk, Getty Images For HFAGImage 5: Tom Holland and Naomi Watts attend "The Impossible" premiere reception at Boulevard3 on Dec. 10, 2012, in Hollywood. Holland poses with fans at the premiere for "In the Heart of the Sea" on Dec. 3, 2015, in Madrid. Larry Busacca, Getty Images For BFCAImage 7: Holland poses with fans at the premiere for "In the Heart of the Sea" on Dec. 3, 2015, in Madrid.

items.title: Noted New York menace Spider-Man crashes J.K. Simmons’ night at the Mets game - Los Angeles Times
items.summary: # Noted New York menace Spider-Man crashes J.K. Simmons’ night at the Mets game. Look, up in the stands — it’s J.K. Simmons and your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man! Jonah Jameson in director Sam Raimi’s “Spider-Man” trilogy, was reunited with his onscreen nemesis at the New York Mets game Tuesday. After a clip from “Spider-Man” was shown on the stadium screen at Citi Field during the Mets game against the Cincinnati Reds, the camera cut to Simmons in the stands. The “Whiplash” actor played along with the bit, turning around to face Spider-Man and waving his arms to express his displeasure. Channeling his inner Jameson, a spirited Simmons then motioned for Spider-Man to get tossed from the game. After playing Jameson in Raimi’s “Spider-Man” trilogy that wrapped in 2007, Simmons returned to the role for a mid-credits cameo in the 2019 film “Spider-Man: Far From Home” when the vocal Spider-Man critic revealed the hero’s identity to the world.

items.title: ‘Spider-Noir’ Puts Nicolas Cage on a Humphrey Bogart and Marvel Comics Collision Course - Men's Health
items.summary: And it all comes from both a *Spider-Man Noir* comic and classic 1930s detective movies. **AT THE START** of 2018’s *Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse*, Peter Parker reminds the audience of everything we already know about Spider-Man: bit by a radioactive spider, death of Uncle Ben, great power and great responsibility, etc. But then the movie throws that aside to introduce a very different type of Spider-Man—not just our star Miles Morales, but a bevy of Spider-People across the multiverse, including a fedora-sporting, purple-prose-spouting, hard-boiled detective voiced by Nicolas Cage. Cage reprises his role as a trench-coat wearing hero with spider-powers, but Spider-Noir has little else in common with any other Spider-Man, let alone his character from the *Spider-Verse* films. Borrowing from the hard-boiled fiction of Dashiell Hammett and Raymond Chandler, even more so than the film noirs that give the miniseries its name, *Spider-Man Noir* reimagines Peter Parker as a poor kid living in New York City slums with his Aunt May, reimagined here as a Leftist radical in the vein of Emma Goldman.

items.title: The Bizarre Legal Reason Spider-Noir Can't Be Called Spider-Man (Or Peter Parker) - SlashFilm
items.summary: The Bizarre Legal Reason Spider-Noir Can't Be Called Spider-Man (Or Peter Parker). Starring Nicolas Cage as a character inspired by the one he played in "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse," Prime Video's new series "Spider-Noir" shows us what it would look like if a web-slinging hero existed as a hard-boiled detective in the 1930s. Cage's character is also named Ben Reilly, not Peter Parker. Nor is he called Spider-Man. What benefit is it to Marvel and/or Amazon to have a "Spider-Man" show without a character named Spider-Man in it? That has a lot to do with why Cage's character isn't called Spider-Man in "Spider-Noir." Rather, his hero moniker is The Spider, and the specific language in that contract makes it clear why the name was changed. ## Marvel has specific rules for characters named Spider-Man. When it comes to anyone bearing the name Spider-Man, the rules on Marvel's side of the fence are pretty darn specific. ## Marvel has even more specific rules for Peter Parker.

items.title: Tom Holland Talks MCU Spider-Man Future, Teases 'Setting Up the Next Chapter' for Miles Morales - IGN India
items.summary: # Tom Holland Talks MCU Spider-Man Future, Teases 'Setting Up the Next Chapter' for Miles Morales. Spider-Man star Tom Holland has discussed his Marvel future, and says he wants to help set up a new era for the franchise — potentially starring Miles Morales. Speaking to Empire, Holland discussed his upcoming fourth Spider-Man solo movie Brand New Day, and revealed how he had pitched its storyline about Peter Parker's personal transformation: something he dubbed as his character's "Spider-Puberty.". Looking further ahead, Holland also hinted that he already knew how he'd like his iteration of the famed webslinger to exit the MCU — after shepherding in a fresh Spider-Man, or Spider-Woman, as his replacement. "For whoever's next, whether that is a Miles Morales or a Spider-Gwen or a Spider-Woman or something like that, I would love to be a part of setting up the next chapter," Holland said. Regardless, Holland says he's now taking a more senior role on the Spider-Man films' production, with his story ideas incorporated into Brand New Day.

turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số bài viết gần đây liên quan đến các diễn viên đã đóng vai Người Nhện:

1. **Tom Holland tròn 30 tuổi! Xem sự nghiệp và cuộc sống của ngôi sao 'Người Nhện' trong ảnh** - Bài viết này từ USA Today kỷ niệm sinh nhật lần thứ 30 của Tom Holland và phản ánh về sự nghiệp của anh ấy, bao gồm cả vai trò là Người Nhện. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.usatoday.com/picture-gallery/entertainment/celebrities/2026/06/01/tom-holland-career-life-photos/90312635007/).

2. **Thông báo mới York menace Spider-Man crashes J.K. Simmons’ night at the Mets game** - Tác phẩm này từ Los Angeles Times thảo luận về J.K. Simmons, người đóng vai J. Jonah Jameson trong bộ ba Người Nhện, và sự xuất hiện gần đây của anh tại một trò chơi Mets. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/movies/story/2026-05-27/spider-man-jk-simmons-j-jonah-jameson-mets-game).

3. **‘Spider-Noir’ đặt Nicolas Cage vào Humphrey Bogart và Marvel Comics Collision Course** - Men's Health khám phá vai trò của Nicolas Cage trong vũ trụ Người Nhện, đặc biệt là trong bộ phim "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse". [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.menshealth.com/entertainment/a71435338/spider-noir-explained-comics-review-nicolas-cage/).

4. **The Bizarre Legal Reason Spider-Noir Can't Be Called Spider-Man (Or Peter Parker)** - Bài viết này từ SlashFilm thảo luận về các lý do pháp lý đằng sau việc đặt tên các nhân vật trong nhượng quyền Người Nhện, tập trung vào nhân vật của Nicolas Cage trong "Spider-Noir". [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.slashfilm.com/2182557/why-spider-noir-not-called-spider-man-peter-parker-legal-reason/).

5. **Tom Holland Talks MCU Spider-Man Future, Teases 'Setting Up the Next Chapter' for Miles Morales** - IGN India có một cuộc phỏng vấn với Tom Holland thảo luận về tương lai của anh ấy trong MCU và tiềm năng cho những câu chuyện Người Nhện mới. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://in.ign.com/spider-man-brand-new-day/261898/tom-holland-talks-mcu-spider-man-future-teases-setting-up-the-next-chapter-for-miles-morales).

Những bài viết này nêu bật sự nghiệp và đóng góp của các diễn viên khác nhau liên quan đến thương hiệu Người Nhện.

rounds.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số bài viết gần đây liên quan đến các diễn viên đã đóng vai Người Nhện:

1. **Tom Holland tròn 30 tuổi! Xem sự nghiệp và cuộc sống của ngôi sao 'Người Nhện' trong ảnh** - Bài viết này từ USA Today kỷ niệm sinh nhật lần thứ 30 của Tom Holland và phản ánh về sự nghiệp của anh ấy, bao gồm cả vai trò là Người Nhện. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.usatoday.com/picture-gallery/entertainment/celebrities/2026/06/01/tom-holland-career-life-photos/90312635007/).

2. **Thông báo mới York menace Spider-Man crashes J.K. Simmons’ night at the Mets game** - Tác phẩm này từ Los Angeles Times thảo luận về J.K. Simmons, người đóng vai J. Jonah Jameson trong bộ ba Người Nhện, và sự xuất hiện gần đây của anh tại một trò chơi Mets. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/movies/story/2026-05-27/spider-man-jk-simmons-j-jonah-jameson-mets-game).

3. **‘Spider-Noir’ đặt Nicolas Cage vào Humphrey Bogart và Marvel Comics Collision Course** - Men's Health khám phá vai trò của Nicolas Cage trong vũ trụ Người Nhện, đặc biệt là trong bộ phim "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse". [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.menshealth.com/entertainment/a71435338/spider-noir-explained-comics-review-nicolas-cage/).

4. **The Bizarre Legal Reason Spider-Noir Can't Be Called Spider-Man (Or Peter Parker)** - Bài viết này từ SlashFilm thảo luận về các lý do pháp lý đằng sau việc đặt tên các nhân vật trong nhượng quyền Người Nhện, tập trung vào nhân vật của Nicolas Cage trong "Spider-Noir". [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://www.slashfilm.com/2182557/why-spider-noir-not-called-spider-man-peter-parker-legal-reason/).

5. **Tom Holland Talks MCU Spider-Man Future, Teases 'Setting Up the Next Chapter' for Miles Morales** - IGN India có một cuộc phỏng vấn với Tom Holland thảo luận về tương lai của anh ấy trong MCU và tiềm năng cho những câu chuyện Người Nhện mới. [Đọc thêm tại đây](https://in.ign.com/spider-man-brand-new-day/261898/tom-holland-talks-mcu-spider-man-future-teases-setting-up-the-next-chapter-for-miles-morales).

Những bài viết này nêu bật sự nghiệp và đóng góp của các diễn viên khác nhau liên quan đến thương hiệu Người Nhện.
